title: onosma bornmuelleri
intro: Onosma bornmuelleri is a species of flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae), commonly known as a type of yellow toadflax. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Onosma bornmuelleri is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
